title: Lack of Audit Logging
description: Insufficient logging and monitoring make it difficult to track user activity, identify security incidents, and hold individuals accountable for their actions. This severely hinders forensic investigations and the ability to prove or disprove malicious activity.
attack_vector: Attackers can operate undetected, making it impossible to trace their actions or identify the source of a breach.
mitigations: Implement comprehensive logging of all critical system events (user logins, data access, configuration changes).
Establish a centralized logging system with retention policies.
Regularly review logs for suspicious activity and establish alerting mechanisms.
